name: Crockpot Round Steak with Rich Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into 5 to 6 serving size pieces.
2. Place the steak pieces in the crockpot.
3. Add onion soup mix, water, and condensed mushroom soup to the pot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
5. Serve with mashed potatoes.
Makes 5 to 6 servings.
